query:
INSERT INTO product_batches (batchCode, productId, customerId, customRequirements, fobSellingPrice, productionStatus, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 'DT-001-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0), 'Oak table with custom dimensions: 200cm x 100cm', 410.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-001-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-001-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 'Darker oak stain finish, thicker tabletop (5cm)', 425.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-001-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-001-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2), 'Standard version, premium wood treatment', 395.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-001-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-001-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3), 'Bulk order 25+ units, volume pricing', 355.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-001-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-002-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 4), 'White marble with gray veining upgrade', 485.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-002-MRB'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-002-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 5), 'Custom diameter: 130cm instead of 120cm', 495.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-002-MRB'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-002-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6), 'Standard version, reinforced pedestal base', 470.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-002-MRB'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-002-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 7), 'Bulk order 15+ units, discounted rate', 425.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-002-MRB'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-002-B005', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 8), 'Custom marble color: Carrara white', 510.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-002-MRB'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-003-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 9), 'Walnut table with extended length: 260cm max', 555.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-003-WAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-003-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 10), 'Custom leg design: straight instead of tapered', 540.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-003-WAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-003-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 11), 'Standard version, premium finish', 525.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-003-WAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-003-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 12), 'Bulk order 20+ units, volume discount', 480.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-003-WAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-004-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 13), 'Tempered glass with tinted finish', 360.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-004-GLS'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-004-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 14), 'Custom frame finish: matte black instead of chrome', 355.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-004-GLS'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-004-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 15), 'Bulk order 30+ units, discounted rate', 315.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-004-GLS'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-005-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 16), 'Acacia wood with natural oil finish upgrade', 445.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-005-ACA'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-005-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 17), 'Custom live edge width: more pronounced', 460.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-005-ACA'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-005-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 18), 'Standard version, premium wood selection', 430.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-005-ACA'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-005-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 19), 'Bulk order 18+ units, volume pricing', 385.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-005-ACA'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DT-005-B005', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0), 'Custom hairpin leg height: 78cm instead of 75cm', 440.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DT-005-ACA';
